News Application Documentation¶

Models¶

class news.models.Article(*args, **kwargs)¶

Article model that can belong to a publisher or be independent.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.CustomUser(*args, **kwargs)¶

Custom user model with roles for the news app.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.Newsletter(*args, **kwargs)¶

Newsletter containing a collection of articles.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.Publisher(*args, **kwargs)¶

Publisher that can have multiple editors and journalists.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶

Views¶

news.views.approve_article(request, pk)¶

Approve an article and send email notifications to subscribers.

news.views.article_detail(request, pk)¶

Display a single article.

news.views.article_detail_api(request, *args, **kwargs)¶

Get, update, or delete an article.

news.views.article_list_create(request, *args, **kwargs)¶

List approved articles or create a new one.

news.views.create_article(request)¶

Create a new article.

news.views.create_newsletter(request)¶

Create a new newsletter.

news.views.delete_article(request, pk)¶

Delete an article.

news.views.delete_newsletter(request, pk)¶

Delete a newsletter.

news.views.edit_article(request, pk)¶

Edit an existing article.

news.views.edit_newsletter(request, pk)¶

Edit an existing newsletter.

news.views.editor_dashboard(request)¶

Show pending articles for editors to review.

news.views.editor_preview_article(request, pk)¶

Allow editors to preview unapproved articles.

news.views.home(request)¶

Display home page with all approved articles.

news.views.is_editor(user)¶

Check if user is an editor.

news.views.is_journalist(user)¶

Check if user is a journalist.

news.views.journalist_dashboard(request)¶

Show journalist’s articles and newsletters.

news.views.newsletter_detail(request, pk)¶

View a single newsletter.

news.views.newsletter_detail_api(request, *args, **kwargs)¶

Get, update, or delete a newsletter.

news.views.newsletter_list(request)¶

View all newsletters.

news.views.newsletter_list_create(request, *args, **kwargs)¶

List newsletters or create a new one.

news.views.register(request)¶

Handle user registration.

news.views.subscribed_articles(request, *args, **kwargs)¶

List articles from subscribed publishers and journalists.

news.views.subscriptions(request)¶

Manage subscriptions for readers.

news.views.toggle_journalist_subscription(request, pk)¶

Subscribe or unsubscribe from a journalist.

news.views.toggle_publisher_subscription(request, pk)¶

Subscribe or unsubscribe from a publisher.

Serializers¶

class news.serializers.ArticleSerializer(*args, **kwargs)¶

Serializer for Article with nested author and publisher.

class news.serializers.NewsletterSerializer(*args, **kwargs)¶

Serializer for Newsletter with nested articles.

class news.serializers.PublisherSerializer(*args, **kwargs)¶

Serializer for Publisher.

class news.serializers.UserSerializer(*args, **kwargs)¶

Serializer for user public info.

News Application
